J-01.name: Run a backtest from natural language

J-04.name: AI insights
J-04.note: Core acceptance (>=1 ranked suggestion renders) met: 10 suggestion chips + analysis paragraph corroborated by screenshot. Evidence file is byte-identical to UT-J-03-walkforward.png (single capture showing both panels). OOS-aware sub-clause not explicitly verifiable from generic chip labels — verify in a future iter, not a baseline failure.

J-05.name: Reference data loads
J-05.note: Frontend code gap: /api/symbols and /api/timeframes return 200 with valid data (26 symbols / 6 timeframes) but the UI never calls them. Symbol is a free-text input; Timeframe is a static hardcoded button group. Not environmental. Tractable: wire both controls to the endpoints.

J-06.name: Warm-cache re-run works end-to-end
J-06.note: Second run produced byte-identical metrics to J-01 (116 trades, -34.98%) -> deterministic + warm-cache reuse at the UI layer; new history entry present. Cold-vs-warm timing (goal.md >=10x criterion) is a backend concern not measured at the UI; J-06's own acceptance (clean second render + history entry) is met.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: OHLCV market data MUST be cached as a single Parquet file per (symbol, timeframe) — NOT one CSV or file per calendar day — and MUST NOT be re-fetched from Binance when a covering local cache exists.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: apps/backend/data/loader.py:63 (_get_daily_cache_path -> {symbol}/{tf}/{YYYY-MM-DD}.csv per calendar day), :51 (MARKET_DATA_CACHE_DIR default /tmp), :302 (rglob *.csv). Pre-existing; NOT introduced by this verify-only iteration. 'minor' = does not trigger REGRESSION halt; this is central remediation work, not product-trivial.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: `BACKTEST_STORE_DIR` (session/run history) MUST NOT default to a volatile `/tmp` path; session and run history MUST survive a process restart.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: apps/backend/backend/session_store.py:26 default '/tmp/backtests'; apps/backend/backend/directions_cache.py:23 default '/tmp/initial_directions'. Runtime durability holds ONLY via the .env override (boot log: .data/backtests). The code default itself is the violation. Pre-existing; not introduced this iteration.

anti_goal_violations.anti_goal: `GET /api/sessions/{id}` (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration `result.json`/`rating.json` payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
anti_goal_violations.evidence: apps/backend/backend/session_routes.py:150-156 loops read_iteration_full() for every iteration. Runtime proof (runs/goal-money-money-iter-0/antigoal-sessions-evidence.txt): open path = 53,920,916 B (~51 MB), 26 full entries, vs lightweight /iterations = 1,273,461 B (~42x smaller). Pre-existing; not introduced this iteration.
